title: Pending Queue Row
description: A single row appended to trips/{slug}/pending.json. App writes, Cowork drains. v2 adds optional workflow-state fields; all new fields are optional at schema level, required at adapter layer.

schemaVersion.description: '1' = Phase 1 contract. '2' = Phase 11a — adds optional workflow-state fields.

id.description: Stable identifier. Drain MUST be idempotent on this id.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the App wrote the row.

tripSlug.description: Active trip slug; matches trips/{slug}/ folder.

kind.description: Source-type of the capture. Drain routes on this field. 'unsorted-image' is the transient state for images awaiting classify-image-kind to firm them up to photo or receipt (Phase 11b).

source.description: Origin surface. 'app' in normal flow; 'test' for fixtures.

status.description: Row lifecycle state. App only writes 'pending'. Cowork flips to 'drained' or 'stuck'.

memoryWorthy.description: User flag marking a row for memoir consideration.

imagePath.description: Relative path to a receipt image (receipt kind only), e.g. trips/{slug}/receipts/{id}.jpg.

visionUsed.description: True when macOS Vision produced the first-pass OCR. Logged by extract-receipt.

payload.description: Kind-specific body. Loose by design — contract tightens in later phases per kind.

dedupKey.description: Optional stable hash used by drain to skip duplicates.

notes.description: Freeform note attached to the capture.

capturedAt.description: Alias of createdAt — canonical capture timestamp in the LogEntry contract.

ingestStatus.description: Write-path state of the raw capture. Adapter fills default when absent.

placementStatus.description: Where the row is pinned. Adapter fills 'unplaced' when absent.

reviewStatus.description: Has the user processed the row? Adapter fills 'unreviewed' when absent.

journalStatus.description: DayOne publish lifecycle. Adapter fills 'none' when absent.

ynabStatus.description: Expense sync lifecycle. Adapter fills 'na' (or 'candidate' for receipts) when absent.

route.description: Routing decisions — names the authoritative prose source per Decision 3.

draft.description: Draft prose owned by App until published (Decision 3, Path A).

overrideSource.description: Who supplied the YNAB payee/category override.

sessionId.description: Phase 11d back-pointer. Set when the row is added to a PublishSession; cleared on abandon.
